docker-compose.yml.description: Spins up postgres:16-alpine on port 5432 with sentinel DB + health-check

migrations/001_init.sql.description: DDL for users table matching UserRepoLive.ts column expectations
migrations/001_init.sql.complexity: O(1) — idempotent via CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS

.env.example.description: All required env vars for API server (PGHOST, PGPORT, PGDATABASE, PGUSER, PGPASSWORD, JWT_SECRET)

migrate.sh.description: Applies all migrations/* SQL files in order using psql
